image_label: test7 - Turkish villa 74 m2 (2+1), single-story plan

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner. x east, y north. Units cm -> m. Outer footprint ~10.14 (x) x 7.82 (y) m. Bottom-left is a covered Veranda; right side holds the two bedrooms (shorter, 6.48 tall).

strokes.note: north perimeter wall. Carries 120/120 windows (living S10, bedroom1 S12).
west perimeter wall. Carries living 120/120 window (S11).
east perimeter wall. Carries bedroom 120/120 windows (S13, S14).
horizontal partition: living/center (above) / Veranda (below). y=2.60 from left 260 band. Carries 120/180 opening to veranda (S15).
veranda east edge / veranda-bedroom2 divide. x=6.28 from bottom 628 band.
vertical partition: living (Yasam 21.7, west) / center (Banyo+Giris/Hol). x=4.47 from top 447 band.
vertical partition: center (Banyo+hall) / bedrooms. x=6.35 from top 447+188 band. Healed door openings (hall->bedrooms) at y~=5.5 and y~=2.8.
horizontal partition: bedroom1 (Yatak 11.4, above) / bedroom2 (Yatak 11.4, below). y=4.58 from right 324 split.
horizontal partition: Banyo (3.3, above) / Giris+Hol (5.7, below) in the center band. Healed door openings (banyo + hall entry). MEDIUM conf.
living north window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S2.
living west window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S3.
bedroom1 north window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S2.
bedroom1 east window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S4.
bedroom2 east window 120/120 cm. z unknown. Parent S4.

banyo north small window 60/40 cm. z unknown. Parent S2.

the right bedroom block is 648 tall vs left 782 -> a 134 strip below the bedrooms (D11); whether that strip is veranda or exterior is phase2's call
uncaptured_visual_elements: FURNITURE excluded: living 2 sofas + armchairs + coffee table + dining table+chairs; kitchen counter/cabinets; 2 beds + wardrobes (bedrooms); veranda 2 lounge chairs + round table
SANITARY excluded: banyo sink, toilet, shower
EQUIPMENT excluded: stove, sink, fridge (kitchen along top wall of living)
FLOOR-FINISH excluded: beige floor fill; veranda checkerboard tile
HEALED DOORS (~4): hall->bedroom1 (S8 y~=5.5); hall->bedroom2 (S8 y~=2.8); banyo door + hall entry (S16)
WINDOWS S10-S15 captured at plan position; z absent (no elevation)
